_doc: Potential definitions (1-5). Text descriptions from wiki; structured effects to be added.

potentials.description: 战技粉碎阵线命中至少两个敌人时，返还15点技力
potentials.name: 阵线扫荡

potentials.description: 天赋活着的旗帜效果加强：获得士气激昂所需的技力恢复量降低至60点。自身士气激昂最大叠加层数+2

effects.note: Implemented in talentConditionalRegistry: logic_override SP threshold 80→60, max stacks 3→5

potentials.name: 战旗飘扬时

potentials.description: 终结技盾卫旗队，上前所需的终结技能量-15%
potentials.name: 塔卫二之盾

potentials.description: 连携技盈月邀击冷却时间-2秒，且技力恢复量变为原本的1.2倍。

effects.note: SP recovery ×1.2 on link — not yet implemented

potentials.name: 新铸剑锋
